title: poa pagophila
intro: Poa pagophila, also known as Arctic blue grass or snow grass, is a type of grass native to the Arctic tundra regions. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Poa pagophila include reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. The plant is typically prepared for medicinal use by making teas, infusions, or tinctures from its leaves and stems.
